prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信类2024年均为高热推荐，电气工程及其自动化高热推荐，人工智能谨慎观望；天津市20 26年考生总数约82000人，较2025年（71938人）增长约14%，竞争明显加剧。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum ranking in 2024 was approximately 506, and in 2025 it was approximately 656, with a shift of about 150 places over two years, indicating a clear trend of intensifying competition; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 656; the university planned to enroll 2 students in Tianjin in 2024, increased to 6 in 2025, and maintained 6 in 2026, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion to alleviate competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings (Harbin Institute of Technology main campus), it ranks approximately 12th, belonging to the top-tier engineering universities in China; the Shenzhen campus shares the same disciplinary evaluations and academic level as the main campus, and its geographical advantage (Shenzhen) further enhances its appeal; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no significant negative public opinion; the university's overall popularity on Douyin ranks 10th (high heat), with high short video exposure, reflecting continuously rising application attention; Mechanics A+, Mechanical Engineering A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, Environmental Science and Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Control Science and Engineering A, Information and Communication Engineering A-, etc., with top-tier engineering strength; the enrollment majors (Computer Science, Communication, Artificial Intelligence, Automation, Robotics Engineering) all correspond to the above A-level disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication majors were both highly recommended in 2024, Electrical Engineering and Automation was highly recommended, and Artificial Intelligence was cautiously observed; the total number of examinees in Tianjin in 2026 is approximately 82,000, an increase of about 14% compared to 2025 (71,938), indicating significantly intensified competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the trend of declining rankings (shift of 150 places from 2024 to 2025), the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the significant increase of about 14% in the total number of examinees in Tianjin, and the continued high popularity of Computer Science/Electronic Information majors, competition is expected to further intensify in 2026; based on the 2025 baseline of 656, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 671, with a range of 590–752.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking of 671 falls within the range of 590–752. It is recommended to focus on the Tier 2 Engineering Experimental Class (Autonomous Intelligence) as the main target and the Tier 1 Engineering Experimental Class (Future Information) as a stretch goal; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (within 590), prioritize the Tier 1 flagship major (Computer Science and Technology); if the ranking is close to the upper bound (around 752), proceed with caution and consider backup options at other institutions of the same level.
